evaluators.name: metrics_presence
evaluators.description: Ensure metrics.json exists and contains a non-empty metrics object.

evaluators.name: result_value_presence
evaluators.description: Ensure every register_results value_path resolves from metrics.json.

evaluators.name: artifact_integrity
evaluators.description: Ensure expected artifacts are present, hashed, and reflected in output_manifest.json.

evaluators.name: claim_result_consistency
evaluators.description: Check acceptance_checks against claim-linked registered results.

evaluators.name: evidence_coverage
evaluators.description: Ensure claim-linked evidence coverage meets the configured minimum.

evaluators.name: provenance_completeness
evaluators.description: Ensure promoted artifacts and registered results carry enough provenance to audit the run.
